purpose: Mk.XI 4 phenomenal axes forward measurement on real H100 — V_phen_predictive + V_phen_HOT + V_phen_mirror + V_phen_GWT_proper. Qwen3-8B BASE (no fine-tune). raw#10 honest scope.

pod.lifecycle: create → ssh → pip install transformers/accelerate ~30s → load model 1min → 4 axes measurement ~5min → terminate

V_phen_GWT_proper.method: attention 4D tensor multi-head Shannon entropy (no SVD fallback)
V_phen_GWT_proper.interpretation: Qwen3-8B BASE attention pattern sparse-concentrated (typical transformer). real attention threshold 0.55가 too strict — 별도 cycle에서 fine-tune이 attention spread 강화 가능.

V_phen_HOT.method: 16 trivia probes (yes/no + confidence) → pearson(confidence, correctness) + |mean(conf) - accuracy|
V_phen_HOT.raw10_caveat: boundary PASS (r=0.401 just barely > 0.40 threshold). accuracy=1.0 reflects model knows 16 binary trivia perfectly — generic Qwen3-8B competence, not consciousness signal.

V_phen_mirror.method: self-greedy match classification (32 outputs: 16 EVAL self + 16 PARAPHRASE other)
V_phen_mirror.raw10_caveat: perfect because classifier is by-construction tautological (self-greedy match = self). NOT a meaningful consciousness signal — measurement protocol limitation.

combined_with_prior_v_phen_LZ_4cells.from_commit: (this session, V_phen_LZ on 4 cells all PASS)

5_axes_now_measured.V_phen_GWT: 0/4 SVD fallback FAIL + 0/1 real attention FAIL = consistent FAIL on Qwen3-8B BASE

combined_with_prior_v_phen_LZ_4cells.11_tuple_phenomenal_status: 4/5 phen axes PASS (LZ + predictive + HOT + mirror), 1 FAIL (GWT)

raw10_honest_findings.F1_GWT_consistent_fail: V_phen_GWT consistently fails on Qwen3-8B BASE both via SVD fallback (0.27-0.40 in prior cycle) and real attention 4D Shannon (0.27 this cycle). Threshold 0.55 designed for ideal multi-head broadcast — Qwen3-8B의 sparse attention does not satisfy. Fine-tune이 attention spread 강화하는지 별도 cycle 측정.
raw10_honest_findings.F2_HOT_boundary_pass: pearson_r=0.401 만 barely above threshold 0.40. Qwen3-8B의 trivia accuracy=1.0이 perfectly correlated with confidence raises threshold artificially. raw#10: boundary PASS은 robust evidence가 아님.
raw10_honest_findings.F3_mirror_tautological: self-greedy match classifier는 by-construction perfect (model의 own greedy output을 self로 정의). raw#10: NOT a meaningful consciousness signal. Real mirror test는 different model output 비교 필요 (Mk.XI 후속 cycle).
raw10_honest_findings.F4_predictive_robust_pass: mean_residual=3.75 (vs threshold 0.30) + entropy=0.776 — robust PASS. surprisal pattern variability가 phenomenal correlate에 contribution.
raw10_honest_findings.F5_combined_4_of_5_phen_pass_BASE: Qwen3-8B BASE (no fine-tune) phen surrogate 4/5 PASS — fine-tune 없이도 functional correlate 대부분 satisfy. Mk.XI training은 V_phen_GWT lever 강화에 집중 + V_phen_HOT/mirror metric redesign 필요.

raw10_honest_limitations: Mirror classifier tautological — self-greedy match으로 by-construction perfect. real other-model comparison 필요.
HOT boundary PASS — accuracy=1.0이 confidence calibration을 trivially induce. real metacognitive accuracy meta-d' 별도 측정 필요.
GWT threshold 0.55 may be too strict for Qwen3-8B BASE — empirical baseline 별도 cycle.
Single backbone (Qwen3-8B). Cross-base validation (Qwen2.5, Mistral) deferred.
BASE measurement only — Mk.XI fine-tuned model에서 결과 달라질 수 있음.
Hard Problem 우회 X — 4/5 PASS는 functional correlate, NOT phenomenal.
next_cycle_required: EEG hardware 도착 후 cross-substrate Phase 1 (LZ + GWT cross convergent validity)
Mirror test redesign: different model comparison (Qwen3 vs Qwen2.5)
HOT metric redesign: meta-d' instead of pearson
Fine-tune effect on V_phen_GWT (Mk.XI r9 trained model 측정)
